raw_comment: I noticed that where ever the bigger country is the more fossil fuels that are being used, This is also where there are more clean power supplies as well. So why don't we just go all clean and get rid of the fossil fuels. I also noticed that China's amount of energy usage is on a straight incline where the US and India are a somewhat straight line.
ace_sentences: A bigger country uses more fossil fuels.
A bigger country has more clean power supplies.
We should get rid of the fossil fuels.
I noticed that China's amount of energy usage is on a straight incline.
I noticed that the US is a somewhat straight line.
I noticed that India is a somewhat straight line.
